name: pdp-bottom-cta
title: Lumelle PDP Bottom CTA Components
description: Bottom CTA card with eyebrow, serif title switching per product, star rating, peach Add to Cart and blush Buy Now buttons, plus optional chip row. Includes MobileStickyCta scroll-triggered sticky buy bar with smart show/hide visibility logic.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
